You spot a sailing ship off in the distance across the water.
The sea is ominously calm... too calm.
You spot a storm brewing on the distant horizons.
There's nothing on the sea horizons. You feel like you can see for infinity.
There's nothing on the sea horizons and the sky is soo empty it seems to blend with the water. You feel like you can see for infinity.
The seas are particularly rough here and violent waves crash all around you.

The seas are particularly rough here, and violent waves crash all around you. In the spray of a large wave you spot a cluster of glimmering white runes.

A few old Westmarch runes shimmer here, left as a narrative reward for servers that track them.

A cluster of runes floats gently across the water.

A lone seagull circles overhead before gliding away across the endless water.
A wooden barrel bobs gently in the waves, drifting wherever the currents take it.
Something large flashes silver beneath the water before vanishing into the depths.
A distant lighthouse stands barely visible on the horizon, its light faint in the daylight.
Long strands of seaweed drift lazily on the surface of the water.
A small pod of dolphins surfaces nearby before disappearing beneath the waves again.
Low thunder rolls across the ocean somewhere far beyond the horizon.
The water around you suddenly pulls in a strange sideways current.
A small rowboat drifts aimlessly across the water with nobody aboard.
A cluster of flying fish bursts from the water and glides across the waves.
A patch of unusually dark water stretches across the sea ahead.
A large piece of driftwood floats past, worn smooth by years in the ocean.
For a moment you think you hear singing carried faintly across the sea breeze.
Waves crash against each other here, forming chaotic splashes of white foam.
A seal pops its head above the water to stare at you before diving again.
A torn fishing net drifts half submerged in the water.
A passing cloud resembles the shape of an enormous whale.
A strong ocean breeze pushes steadily across the water.
Sunlight reflects across the waves like thousands of scattered coins.
A burst of sea spray splashes over you as a wave breaks nearby.
A massive shadow glides slowly beneath the water before fading away.
A rusted buoy rocks back and forth with the rhythm of the sea.
Far in the distance you see the misty spout of a whale.
The broken mast of a ship floats half submerged among scattered planks.
A tiny sail appears on the horizon before slowly disappearing again.
A bright halo forms around the sun through thin ocean clouds.
A strange ripple travels across the surface of the water without wind.
A small area of perfectly calm water sits strangely still among the waves.
Foamy white streaks trail across the ocean surface.
A seabird plunges into the water to catch a fish.
Dark grey clouds form a long wall along the horizon.
A sudden cold wind sweeps across the open sea.
A sealed wooden crate drifts slowly past your path.
A thick bank of fog begins rolling across the ocean.
For a moment you hear the faint ringing of distant ship bells.
The air fills with the sharp scent of salt and crashing waves.
A tired seagull lands briefly nearby before taking off again.
The water here looks incredibly deep and dark.
Slow rolling waves lift and fall beneath you.
The setting sun paints the ocean in brilliant orange and red.
The moon reflects across the water in a long shimmering path.
Something large splashes far off across the waves.
A thick rope trails across the surface of the water.
A dense patch of kelp drifts together like a small island.
A shark fin cuts briefly through the surface before vanishing.
A lone oar floats quietly on the ocean surface.
A fine mist hangs just above the water.
A flock of seabirds circles repeatedly over one spot in the water.
A faint green glow pulses beneath the waves.
A foamy current streaks across the sea like a white ribbon.
A deep haunting whale call echoes across the water.
Low fog blankets the sea, obscuring the horizon completely.
Large slow swells roll endlessly across the open sea.
A torn scrap of sailcloth flutters across the waves.
A huge albatross glides effortlessly across the wind.
The ocean water here looks especially cold and dark.
A large wave crashes loudly against nearby rocks.
For a moment the sea becomes smooth as glass.
Sea spray catches the sunlight forming a faint rainbow.
Heavy clouds roll steadily across the sky above the sea.
Lightning flashes silently far beyond the horizon.
Several seabirds glide low over the water searching for fish.
Warm mist rises slowly from the ocean surface.
A noticeably colder current flows through the water here.
A cluster of strange broad sea leaves drifts nearby.
Small translucent jellyfish drift beneath the surface.
Tiny flashes of light flicker in the water with each wave.
The tide appears to be slowly rising.
The open ocean stretches endlessly in every direction.
A lonely sea rock breaks the surface far away.
Foamy trails ripple across the water behind unseen movement.
Small bits of wood and debris drift together in a slow cluster.
The warm sun shines brightly over the open sea.
For a while the ocean grows strangely quiet.
The sky slowly darkens as clouds gather overhead.
The horizon glows golden beneath the setting sun.
The wind dies down leaving only the slow motion of the waves.
A long ocean swell passes slowly beneath you.
A long line of white foam stretches across the sea in the distance.
